steps.title: Calculate the slope from two points
steps.content:
Using points (0, 31) and (2, 43) from the table:
$$m = \frac{43 - 31}{2 - 0} = \frac{12}{2} = 6$$

steps.title: Use the slope-to-ratio relationship
steps.content:
Rearranging $Ax + By = C$ to slope-intercept form:
$$y = -\frac{A}{B}x + \frac{C}{B}$$
The slope equals the coefficient of $x$, so $-\frac{A}{B} = 6$. Therefore:
$$\frac{A}{B} = -6$$
